case_title: EUGENIO DE ARNAL VS. JOHN PASINI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER OVERRULING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY BRAVO & MARGULIES ATTORNEYS AT LAW AS COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR AUG-05-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-09-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JOHN PASINI'S NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO DISQUALIFY DEFENDANTS ATTORNEY'S IS OFF CALENDAR AS A CALENDARING ERROR. THE MATTER WAS SET IN DEPARTMENT 501 ACCORDING TO THE REGISTER OF ACTIONS AND THIS IS A WRONGFUL EVICTION CASE. DEPARTMENT 501 HEARS WRONGFUL EVICTION CASES. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Mtn To Disqualify
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bracamontes, Esq. and Jessica Lopez, certified law student (415-835-6777) for Eugenio De Arnal, plaintiff and moving party / Jeffrey Evan Margulies (415-512-6700) for John Pasini, defendant and opposing party

ARGUED - After hearing the oral arguments, the Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF EUGENIO DE ARNAL's Motion To Disqualify Bravo and Margulies is DENIED. Prevailing party will submit proposed order approved as to form. Judge Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Ntc Of Opposition To Pltfs Motion To Disqualify Defts Attorney'S; Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JOHN PASINI'S Notice Of Opposition To Plaintiffs Motion To Disqualify Defendants Attorney's is off calendar as a calendaring error. The matter was set in department 501 according to the register of actions and this is a wrongful eviction case. Department 501 hears wrongful eviction cases. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
